title: MCXR Core
description: Core VR functionality for Non-VR Players, VR Players and Servers
body:
MCXR Core is the base mod for [MCXR Play](https://modrinth.com/mod/mcxr-play) and used for VR related features in Non-VR environments. Currently there is no benefit from installing this on Non-VR clients but eventually this mod will be used for 3rd person VR animations.

## Server-Side Features
- Dynamic VR player height
- Thinner VR player hitboxes
- VR projectile firing
- VR teleporation

## Client-Side Features
- 🚧 3rd person VR player model
